name: @demon/client
description: Browser SDK for the DEMON realtime music backend: WebSocket session client, binary slice decoding, realtime audio playback, and the self-describing wire-contract/knob manifests.
//: 1. In-repo bundled apps (the rtmg Next demo) import the TS source
via their tsconfig's @demon/client path alias; the host bundler
transpiles it and provides the fzstd peer dependency.
2. Static no-build demos (demos/arp) load the committed browser
audio-worklet.js), which the demo server mounts at /sdk/.
Regenerate with `npm install && npm run build` after any SDK
3. External demo repos can vendor this directory, install it as a
file:/git dependency, or (eventually) install a published
@demon/client — the import surface is index.ts either way.
